Off Calendar Dec-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ROADRUNNER TRANSPORTATION SERVICES'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The verified application of Ashley E. Paynter to appear as counsel pro hac vice for Defendant is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

The movant is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
